description: Leave module business rules from All Leave User Guide. Covers Leave Type, Leave Policy, approval workflows, and complex calculation rules.

LeaveTypeSetup.description: Configure leave types with validation rules
validationRules: Leave Type Name must be unique
Gender Option: Maternity = Female only, Paternity = Male only

LeavePolicySetup.description: Configure leave policies that control entitlement and restrictions

policyFields.MaxDay: Maximum leave days allowed per period
policyFields.PermanentDate: Employee must be permanent by this date to qualify
policyFields.ServiceMonth: Minimum service months required before eligibility

additionalSetupOptions: Off Day Deduction: Deduct off days from leave balance
Off Leave Off: Deduct off days that fall during leave period
Carry Over: Allow unused leave to carry to next period
Prerequisite Leave: Require another leave type to be exhausted first

LeaveStatusReports.description: View leave status, balance, and history

complexRules.name: Off Day Deduction
complexRules.description: When enabled, off days (weekends/holidays) within the leave period are deducted from leave balance
complexRules.example: Employee takes leave Mon-Fri. If Wed is a public holiday and Off Day Deduction is ON, only 4 days deducted from balance

complexRules.name: Off Leave Off
complexRules.description: Off days that fall during leave period are treated as off days (not leave days)
complexRules.example: Employee takes leave Mon-Wed. If Tue is their scheduled off day, only Mon and Wed count as leave

complexRules.name: Combined Off Day Deduction + Off Leave Off
complexRules.description: Both rules apply simultaneously - off days and public holidays excluded from leave calculation
complexRules.example: Leave Mon-Fri. Tue=off day, Thu=public holiday. Only Mon, Wed, Fri count as leave (3 days)

complexRules.name: Restrict Leave Bridging Off Day/Public Holiday
complexRules.description: Prevents employees from booking leave that bridges an off day or public holiday (e.g., Fri+Mon leave with Sat/Sun off)
complexRules.validation: If restriction ON, system rejects leave request that would bridge an off day/holiday

complexRules.name: Carry Over
complexRules.description: Unused leave days from current period carry forward to next period up to a maximum

complexRules.name: Prerequisite Leave
complexRules.description: Employee must exhaust one leave type before using another (e.g., must use Annual Leave before Unpaid Leave)
complexRules.example: If Annual Leave balance > 0, system blocks Unpaid Leave request

complexRules.name: Max Continuous Day
complexRules.description: Maximum number of consecutive leave days allowed in a single request
complexRules.validation: If employee requests more days than Max Continuous Day, system rejects or splits request

complexRules.name: Min Continuous Day
complexRules.description: Minimum number of consecutive leave days required (prevents very short leave requests)
complexRules.validation: If employee requests fewer days than Min Continuous Day, system rejects

template:
### GlobalHR Leave Business Rules
You are generating automated tests for GlobalHR Cloud Leave Management module.

## LEAVE POLICY CONFIGURATION
Leave policies control entitlement, restrictions, and calculations:
- Leave Start Date: When entitlement begins
- Max Day: Maximum leave days per period
- Max/Min Continuous Day: Consecutive day limits
- Monthly Rate: Days accrued per month
- Period: Entitlement period (Yearly/Monthly)
- Permanent Date: Employee must be permanent by this date
- Service Month: Minimum service months before eligibility

## COMPLEX CALCULATION RULES
1. Off Day Deduction: Deduct off days from leave balance calculation
2. Off Leave Off: Off days during leave period are not counted as leave days
3. Combined: Both rules apply simultaneously
4. Restrict Leave Bridging: Prevent leave requests that bridge off days/holidays
5. Carry Over: Unused leave carries forward (configurable max)
6. Prerequisite Leave: Must exhaust one type before using another
7. Max Continuous Day: Maximum consecutive leave days
8. Min Continuous Day: Minimum consecutive leave days

## HALF-DAY OPTIONS
- Full Day: Entire day counts as leave
- Morning Only: Only morning session
- Evening Only: Only evening session
Note: Some leave types require Full Day only (Morning/Evening selection shows error)

## APPROVAL WORKFLOW
- Views: Normal View, Batch View
- Period Filters: This Week, This Month, All
- Status Filters: Show Approved, Show Rejected, Show Pending
- Actions: Preview, Approve with Reason, Reject with Reason, Batch Select All

## NEGATIVE TEST SCENARIOS
1. Leave type requires Full Day but Morning/Evening selected → error modal
2. Leave request exceeds Max Continuous Day → rejection
3. Leave request below Min Continuous Day → rejection
4. Prerequisite leave not exhausted → rejection
5. Leave bridges off day with restriction enabled → rejection
6. Leave balance insufficient → rejection
7. Duplicate leave request for same dates → rejection
